finish-args.--device=all: Serial console access via picocom requires device access
finish-args.--filesystem=home/.ssh:ro: SSH connection manager requires read access to SSH keys for authentication
finish-args.--socket=ssh-auth: SSH connection manager requires SSH agent access for key-based authentication
finish-args.--talk-name=org.freedesktop.Flatpak: Connection manager with built-in terminal requires host shell access for Local Shell feature (same as Ptyxis, Black Box, Freelens)
